name: bioroffice
description: Microsoft Office automation for BioRouter — create, read, and edit Word (.docx), Excel (.xlsx), and PowerPoint (.pptx) documents through the bundled OfficeCLI engine. Self-contained: no Microsoft Office installation required.

env_vars.description: Optional absolute path to an officecli binary. Leave empty to use the binary bundled with the extension (auto-downloaded if missing for your platform).
Set to 1 (default) to disable OfficeCLI's background self-update so the engine version stays pinned and deterministic.

skills.name: bioroffice-office-suite
skills.description: Core guide for the BiorOffice officecli tool: command grammar, DOM paths, help system, and dynamic specialized-skill loading for Word, Excel, and PowerPoint

skills.name: bioroffice-word
skills.description: Create and edit rich-formatted Word documents: headings, styles, tables, images, headers/footers, TOC, footnotes, tracked changes

skills.name: bioroffice-excel
skills.description: Create and edit Excel workbooks: cells, complex formulas, charts, pivot tables, conditional formatting, named ranges, data validation

skills.name: bioroffice-powerpoint
skills.description: Create and edit PowerPoint presentations: slides, shapes, text styling, images, tables, charts, transitions, speaker notes
